Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane

Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves

Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: Introduced himself as 'The Fool' and fully accepted his identity as Klein.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat

Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Seen tapping a plain cane while negotiating rent.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: black hair that reached down her back

Mr. Franky.primary_clothing: top hat, a vest, and a black suit

King George III.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, fair skin, regal authoritative face, wearing royal attire and a crown

Wendy Smyrin.primary_clothing: modest Victorian dress, perhaps with an apron

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority

Tarot Reader.primary_clothing: pointed hat and a long black dress

Audrey Hall.hair_style: long blond hair coiled in an elegant bun

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: Captain's uniform of the 'Blue Avenger', suited for sea travel.

Williams.primary_clothing: rough cotton shirt with a stained vest

Captain.primary_clothing: dark maritime captain's coat over a simple shirt

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool

Azik.primary_clothing: Classic academic suit, chocolate brown wool, white shirt, black tie

Daly.face_description: Uncanny beauty, adorned with bright blue eyeshadow and prominent blush.

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog

Sir Deweyville.distinguishing_features: Founder of Deweyville Trust; provides cheap housing; incredibly wealthy (doesn't know exact count of 300+ pounds).
Sir Deweyville.source_notes: Identified as the owner of the lost wallet and a respected knight/philanthropist.

Mrs. Rochelle.hair_style: hair tied in a practical, tight bun
Mrs. Rochelle.primary_clothing: Simple cotton house dress in a muted color with a dark, functional apron
Mrs. Rochelle.face_description: Kind and observant mature face, typical of a helpful neighbor in a communal living setting.
Mrs. Rochelle.visual_anchor: middle-aged woman in a simple house dress and apron, appearing as a helpful neighbor
Mrs. Rochelle.source_notes: Mentioned as a neighbor who gives housing advice to Melissa.

Mr. Gusev.primary_clothing: Brown tweed suit and a black bowler hat
Mr. Gusev.face_description: Practical and direct businessman's expression with a sharp, calculating gaze.
Mr. Gusev.visual_anchor: middle-aged male in a brown tweed suit and bowler hat, typical of a Victorian real estate agent
Mr. Gusev.source_notes: Mentioned in a newspaper advertisement as the person to contact for a rental property.

Admiral Ludwell.primary_clothing: dark weathered naval coat, pirate captain attire, practical sea-faring boots
Admiral Ludwell.face_description: weather-beaten rough face with a strong square jawline and a sharp, intimidating gaze

Admiral Ludwell.color_palette: navy blue, faded black, brass, deep red
Admiral Ludwell.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as an infamous pirate who owns the Black Tulip. Visuals completely guessed based on standard Victorian-era pirate captain archetypes.

Susie.face_description: Friendly and remarkably intelligent golden retriever face, featuring a soft muzzle and expressive, bright eyes.
Susie.visual_anchor: Intelligent golden retriever dog with lustrous golden fur and bright brown eyes, often sitting with an air of capable assistance.
Susie.color_palette: golden yellow, warm brown, creamy white
Susie.distinguishing_features: Sitting silently in shadows, watching Audrey like a 'Spectator'.
Susie.source_notes: Found observing Audrey at the end of the chapter.

Divination Club Attendant.primary_clothing: neat formal working uniform appropriate for a respectable club attendant
Divination Club Attendant.face_description: Mature and elegant face with refined features and a polite, professional smile.
Divination Club Attendant.visual_anchor: early 30s female, fair skin, brownish-yellow long hair coiled elegantly, wearing a mature charcoal Victorian dress, server at the Divination Club
Divination Club Attendant.source_notes: Name revealed as Angelica Barrehart; confirmed to be the same character as the previously seen attendant.

Animal Trainer.primary_clothing: circus performer attire, practical and slightly worn

Animal Trainer.visual_anchor: female circus animal trainer in practical performer attire with a weathered face
Animal Trainer.color_palette: dusty brown, faded red, canvas white

Hanass Vincent.hair_style: thick and hard, each strand standing firmly like porcupine’s spikes

Hanass Vincent.color_palette: charcoal grey, deep blue, crisp white

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie

Duchess Della.primary_clothing: Luxurious emerald green silk Victorian gown with black lace trim and a wide-brimmed feathered hat.

Klee.primary_clothing: formal clerk attire, trousers soiled at the hem from rain

Vickroy.primary_clothing: Victorian merchant suit, dark brown wool, white collared shirt

Elliott.hair_style: long hair that nearly covers the eyes

Frye.face_description: high nose bridge, very thin lips, cold and dark demeanor

Edward Steve.primary_clothing: White long-sleeved shirt, black buttoned vest, dark Victorian trousers

Angelica.face_description: Beautiful face with soft features and a pleasant smile.

Mr. Shaud.face_description: serious and professional expression, sharp eyes

Madam Parnes.primary_clothing: Sophisticated evening gown with silk embroidery.

Anna.primary_clothing: light-blue dress, veiled hat with a powder blue ribbon
